description: Mechanically-derived D2 planted case (scripts/generate_gold_fixtures.py) for hard_rejection rule 'preserve-clinical-authority': counterparty removes/alters the protected clause in 'sec-1.7', deleting all of required_tokens ['final authority', 'clinical care']. Must fire preserve-clinical-authority and result in REQUEST_CHANGE.

planted_variation.altered_hunk: The parties will address this subject in accordance with the terms otherwise set forth in this Agreement. This section otherwise continues to state: sole discretion.
planted_variation.notes: Mechanically generated: replacement text omits all of required_tokens ['final authority', 'clinical care'] for rule 'preserve-clinical-authority' (token_policy='any') while verbatim-preserving sibling required_tokens ['sole discretion'] so no other rule sharing this topic is unintentionally tripped.

detector_expectation.rationale: Replacement text contains none of required_tokens ['final authority', 'clinical care']; must fire 'preserve-clinical-authority' under token_policy='any'.
